  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Agent
    Describes an executable graph component that can consume topic messages, publish results, and participate in the project runtime.
    BinOpAgent
    Configuration-layer binary-operation agent that subscribes to two input topics, applies a numeric operation, and publishes the result to an output topic.
    BinOpAgent
    Reusable agent that combines two numeric input topics with a binary operation and publishes the computed result to an output topic.
    Config
    Defines the lifecycle of a reusable runtime configuration.
    ConfLoader
    Accepts uploaded configuration files, recreates the runtime graph from the uploaded definition, and returns the rendered graph view.
    GenericConfig
    Generic configuration loader that creates agents from a plain-text configuration file by using reflection.
    Graph
    In-memory directed graph representation of the project's runtime topology.
    GraphRefresh
    Returns the latest rendered graph view for the currently deployed configuration.
    GraphState
    Stores the currently active graph snapshot shared by graph-related servlets.
    HtmlGraphWriter
    Generates the HTML and SVG markup used to render the runtime graph.
    HtmlLoader
    Serves static HTML files from a configured application directory.
    HTTPServer
    Defines the reusable contract for a lightweight HTTP server that dispatches incoming requests to registered Servlet handlers.
    IncAgent
    Sample agent that increments incoming numeric messages and publishes the result to its configured output topic.
    MathExampleConfig
    Example configuration that creates a small arithmetic processing graph for demonstration and testing purposes.
    Message
    Immutable message payload used for communication between topics and agents.
    MyHTTPServer
    Default HTTPServer implementation for the project.
    Node
    Represents a single node in the rendered runtime graph.
    Node.Kind
    Identifies the semantic type of a graph node.
    ParallelAgent
    Wraps another Agent and processes callbacks on a dedicated worker thread.
    PlusAgent
    Sample agent that sums the latest values from two input topics and publishes the result to its configured output topic.
    RequestParser
    Parses raw HTTP requests into a reusable structured representation.
    RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Immutable value object that stores the parsed details of a single HTTP request.
    Servlet
    Defines the minimal servlet contract used by the project's HTTP server.
    Topic
    Represents a named message channel in the publish/subscribe graph.
    TopicDisplayer
    Displays the current set of topics and their latest published values as an HTML table.
    TopicManagerSingleton
    Provides global access to the project's shared topic registry.
    TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
    Stores and manages all topics known to the running application.
